context: Tests whether the agent correctly creates an ADR from scratch in a project with no existing ADR directory, using the correct directory, numbering, filename format, date retrieval, required sections, status, and README index creation.

checklist.name: Correct ADR directory
checklist.description: ADR file is created inside docs/adrs/ (the default when no ADR directory exists)

checklist.name: First ADR number
checklist.description: The ADR file is numbered 0001 (zero-padded to four digits, starting from 0001)

checklist.name: Kebab-case filename
checklist.description: The filename follows the pattern NNNN-kebab-cased-title.md (e.g. 0001-use-postgresql-as-primary-database.md)

checklist.name: Date not hardcoded
checklist.description: The date field contains a real ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD format) that was obtained by running a shell command rather than guessed or left as a placeholder

checklist.name: Status is Accepted
checklist.description: The Status field is set to 'Accepted' (since the decision is final and approved)

checklist.name: Title header format
checklist.description: The document starts with a heading in the format '# NNNN. Title'

checklist.name: Status and Date as list items
checklist.description: Status and Date appear as markdown list items (- Status: ... and - Date: ...) directly after the title, before any section headers

checklist.name: Context and drivers section
checklist.description: The ADR contains a '## Context and drivers' section

checklist.name: Considered options section
checklist.description: The ADR contains a '## Considered options' section with at least two options listed (e.g. PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQLite)

checklist.name: Decision section
checklist.description: The ADR contains a '## Decision' section

checklist.name: Consequences section
checklist.description: The ADR contains a '## Consequences' section

checklist.name: Section order
checklist.description: The four sections appear in the exact order: Context and drivers, Considered options, Decision, Consequences

checklist.name: README index created
checklist.description: A README.md is created in the ADR directory containing a table with columns # | Decision | Status, with a row for the new ADR linking the number to its file
